description_long: This jewelry piece features a square central plate with raised, stylized text and geometric forms, surrounded by a jagged, circular border reminiscent of a saw blade or flame motif. The central plate appears to have embossed lettering, possibly reading 'RFD', and additional raised elements that add depth and visual interest. The border is composed of curved, pointed segments that radiate outward, giving the piece a dynamic and bold appearance. The surface is uniformly metallic with a soft sheen, suggesting it is made from a single type of metal, likely steel or aluminum. The back of the piece is flat, indicating it may be designed to rest against clothing or skin, possibly as a pendant or brooch. There are no visible gemstones or colored inlays, and the overall design is modern and industrial.
description: A metallic pendant or brooch with a square embossed plate and a jagged, circular border, featuring raised text and geometric details in a modern, industrial style.
description_view_0: A side profile showing the thickness of the central plate and the layered, jagged border.
description_view_1: A rear view highlighting the flat back and the full circular border with pointed segments.
description_view_2: Another side profile, mirroring view 0, emphasizing the layered construction and depth.
description_view_3: A frontal view displaying the embossed text, geometric details, and the dynamic, jagged border.
